tEn: RoboBrain: A Unified Brain Model for Robotic Manipulation from Abstract to Concrete
tZh: RoboBrain：从抽象到具体的机器人操作统一大脑模型
sEn: RoboBrain integrates planning, affordance perception, and trajectory prediction for robotic manipulation.
sZh: RoboBrain整合了规划、可供性感知和轨迹预测，用于机器人操作。
absEn: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities across various multimodal contexts. However, their application in robotic scenarios, particularly for long-horizon manipulation tasks, reveals significant limitations. These limitations arise from the current MLLMs lacking three essential robotic brain capabilities: Planning Capability, which involves decomposing complex manipulation instructions into manageable sub-tasks; Affordance Perception, the ability to recognize and interpret the affordances of interactive objects; and Trajectory Prediction, the foresight to anticipate the complete manipulation trajectory necessary for successful execution. To enhance the robotic brain's core capabilities from abstract to concrete, we introduce ShareRobot, a high-quality heterogeneous dataset that labels multi-dimensional information such as task planning, object affordance, and end-effector trajectory. ShareRobot's diversity and accuracy have been meticulously refined by three human annotators. Building on this dataset, we developed RoboBrain, an MLLM-based model that combines robotic and general multi-modal data, utilizes a multi-stage training strategy, and incorporates long videos and high-resolution images to improve its robotic manipulation capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoboBrain achieves state-of-the-art performance across various robotic tasks, highlighting its potential to advance robotic brain capabilities.
absZh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在多种多模态场景中展现出卓越能力，但在机器人场景，尤其是长程操作任务中，存在显著局限性。这些局限性源于当前MLLMs缺乏三种关键的机器人脑能力：规划能力（将复杂操作指令分解为可管理的子任务）、可供性感知（识别和解释交互对象的可供性）以及轨迹预测（预见成功执行所需的完整操作轨迹）。为从抽象到具体增强机器人脑的核心能力，我们引入了ShareRobot，一个高质量异构数据集，标注了任务规划、对象可供性和末端执行器轨迹等多维信息。ShareRobot的多样性和准确性由三位人工标注员精心优化。基于此数据集，我们开发了RoboBrain，一个基于MLLM的模型，结合了机器人和通用多模态数据，采用多阶段训练策略，并利用长视频和高分辨率图像提升其机器人操作能力。大量实验表明，RoboBrain在各种机器人任务中达到了最先进的性能，突显了其提升机器人脑能力的潜力。

contrib.en: Proposes RoboBrain, a unified MLLM for robotic manipulation from abstract to concrete.
contrib.zh: 提出 RoboBrain，一个从抽象到具体的统一多模态大语言模型，用于机器人操作。

contrib.en: Introduces ShareRobot, a large-scale fine-grained dataset with task planning, affordance, and trajectory labels.
contrib.zh: 引入 ShareRobot，一个大规模细粒度数据集，包含任务规划、可供性和轨迹标注。

contrib.en: Designs a multi-stage training strategy combining robotic and general multi-modal data with long videos and high-resolution images.
contrib.zh: 设计多阶段训练策略，结合机器人数据和通用多模态数据，并融入长视频和高分辨率图像。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on RoboVQA, OpenEQA, and ShareRobot benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在 RoboVQA、OpenEQA 和 ShareRobot 基准测试上达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Enhances affordance perception and trajectory prediction via LoRA modules, outperforming baselines.
contrib.zh: 通过 LoRA 模块增强可供性感知和轨迹预测，性能超越基线模型。

limits.en: Relies on Open X-Embodiment data, limiting generalization to unseen embodiments.
limits.zh: 依赖 Open X-Embodiment 数据，限制了对未见机器人的泛化能力。

limits.en: Affordance and trajectory annotations are 2D bounding boxes, not 3D or real-world coordinates.
limits.zh: 可供性和轨迹标注为 2D 边界框，而非 3D 或真实世界坐标。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to simulation benchmarks; real-world robot deployment not tested.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于仿真基准测试，未在真实机器人上部署验证。

limits.en: Model size (7B) may limit complex reasoning; larger models not explored.
limits.zh: 模型规模（7B）可能限制复杂推理，未探索更大模型。

limits.en: Dataset filtering criteria may introduce bias towards successful demonstrations.
limits.zh: 数据集筛选标准可能引入对成功演示的偏差。

items.en: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities across various multimodal contexts. However, their application in robotic scenarios, particularly for long-horizon manipulation tasks, reveals significant limitations. These limitations arise from the current MLLMs lacking three essential robotic brain capabilities: Planning Capability, which involves decomposing complex manipulation instructions into manageable sub-tasks; Affordance Perception, the ability to recognize and interpret the affordances of interactive objects; and Trajectory Prediction, the foresight to anticipate the complete manipulation trajectory necessary for successful execution. To enhance the robotic brain’s core capabilities from abstract to concrete, we introduce ShareRobot, a high-quality heterogeneous dataset that labels multi-dimensional information such as task planning, object affordance, and end-effector trajectory. ShareRobot’s diversity and accuracy have been meticulously refined by three human annotators. Building on this dataset, we developed RoboBrain, an MLLM-based model that combines robotic and general multi-modal data, utilizes a multi-stage training strategy, and incorporates long videos and high-resolution images to improve its robotic manipulation capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoboBrain achieves state-of-the-art performance across various robotic tasks, highlighting its potential to advance robotic brain capabilities. Project website: RoboBrain.
items.zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的最新进展在各种多模态场景中展现了卓越的能力。然而，它们在机器人场景中的应用，特别是对于长期操作任务，显示出显著的局限性。这些局限性源于当前的MLLMs缺乏三种关键的机器人脑能力：规划能力（将复杂操作指令分解为可管理的子任务）、可供性感知（识别和解释交互对象的可供性）以及轨迹预测（预测成功执行所需的完整操作轨迹）。为了从抽象到具体增强机器人脑的核心能力，我们引入了ShareRobot，一个高质量异构数据集，标注了任务规划、对象可供性和末端执行器轨迹等多维信息。ShareRobot的多样性和准确性由三位人工标注员精心优化。基于该数据集，我们开发了RoboBrain，一个基于MLLM的模型，结合了机器人和通用多模态数据，采用多阶段训练策略，并融入长视频和高分辨率图像以提升其机器人操作能力。大量实验表明，RoboBrain在各种机器人任务中达到了最先进的性能，突显了其在推进机器人脑能力方面的潜力。项目网站：RoboBrain。

items.en: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced the pursuit of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). By leveraging extensive multimodal datasets sourced from the internet and employing self-supervised learning techniques, MLLMs demonstrate exceptional capabilities in visual perception and understanding human language instructions, excelling in tasks such as visual question answering [3, 14, 15], image captioning [35, 37], and sentiment analysis [17]. Despite significant progress in MLLMs, the exploration of their application in robotics remains in its early stages, highlighting a crucial area for further research and innovation.
items.zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的最新进展显著推动了通用人工智能（AGI）的追求。通过利用来自互联网的广泛多模态数据集并采用自监督学习技术，MLLMs在视觉感知和理解人类语言指令方面表现出卓越的能力，在视觉问答[3, 14, 15]、图像描述[35, 37]和情感分析[17]等任务中表现出色。尽管MLLMs取得了显著进展，但对其在机器人领域应用的探索仍处于早期阶段，这凸显了一个关键的研究和创新领域。

items.en: Recent studies have examined the application of MLLMs in robotics, focusing on planning and subgoal decomposition [6, 25], action sequencing [9, 8], and replanning and feedback [46, 41]. However, their effectiveness in robotic scenarios—particularly for long-horizon manipulation tasks—reveals significant limitations. These limitations stem from the current MLLMs’ lack of three critical robotic capabilities: planning, affordance perception, and trajectory prediction, as illustrated in Fig. 1. For instance, consider a robotic arm tasked with lifting a teapot and pouring water into a cup. The MLLM should be capable of decomposing this task into sub-tasks, such as “approach the teapot and lift it”, “move the teapot until the spout is positioned over the cup”, and “tilt the teapot to pour”. For each sub-task, such as “approach and grasp the teapot”, the MLLM must utilize affordance perception to accurately identify the graspable regions of the teapot. Additionally, trajectory prediction is essential for determining the complete path from the starting point to the graspable part of the teapot. This challenge for existing MLLMs primarily arises from the scarcity of large-scale, fine-grained datasets specifically designed for robotic operation tasks.
items.zh: 最近的研究考察了MLLMs在机器人领域的应用，重点关注规划与子目标分解[6, 25]、动作序列化[9, 8]以及重新规划与反馈[46, 41]。然而，它们在机器人场景中的有效性——特别是对于长期操作任务——显示出显著的局限性。这些局限性源于当前的MLLMs缺乏三种关键的机器人能力：规划、可供性感知和轨迹预测，如图1所示。例如，考虑一个机器人手臂被要求提起茶壶并将水倒入杯子。MLLM应该能够将此任务分解为子任务，如“接近茶壶并提起它”、“移动茶壶直到壶嘴位于杯子上方”和“倾斜茶壶倒水”。对于每个子任务，如“接近并抓取茶壶”，MLLM必须利用可供性感知来准确识别茶壶的可抓取区域。此外，轨迹预测对于确定从起点到茶壶可抓取部分的完整路径至关重要。现有MLLMs面临的这一挑战主要源于缺乏专门为机器人操作任务设计的大规模细粒度数据集。

items.en: To empower the RoboBrain’s core capabilities from abstract to concrete, we first introduce ShareRobot, a large-scale, fine-grained dataset specifically designed for robotic operation tasks. Specifically, we label multi-dimensional information such as task planning, object affordance, and end-effector trajectory. Building upon ShareRobot, we developed RoboBrain, an MLLM model based on the LLaVA [40] architecture, aimed at enhancing the perception and planning capabilities of robots in complex tasks. In the process of training RoboBrain, we meticulously designed the ratio of robotic data to general multi-modal data, implemented a multi-stage training strategy, and incorporated long videos and high-resolution images. This approach endowed RoboBrain with powerful visual information perception capabilities in robotic scenarios, supporting historical frame memory and high-definition image input, thereby further enhancing the ability in robotic manipulation planning. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that RoboBrain outperforms existing models across multiple robotic benchmarks, including RoboVQA [60] and OpenEQA [49], achieving state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, it shows competitive results in trajectory and affordance prediction accuracy. These findings validate the effectiveness of the proposed dataset and framework in enhancing robotic brain capabilities. In summary, the main contributions of this paper are as follows:
items.zh: 为了从抽象到具体赋予RoboBrain核心能力，我们首先引入了ShareRobot，一个专门为机器人操作任务设计的大规模细粒度数据集。具体来说，我们标注了任务规划、对象可供性和末端执行器轨迹等多维信息。基于ShareRobot，我们开发了RoboBrain，一个基于LLaVA [40]架构的MLLM模型，旨在增强机器人在复杂任务中的感知和规划能力。在训练RoboBrain的过程中，我们精心设计了机器人数据与通用多模态数据的比例，实施了多阶段训练策略，并融入了长视频和高分辨率图像。这种方法赋予了RoboBrain在机器人场景中强大的视觉信息感知能力，支持历史帧记忆和高清图像输入，从而进一步增强了机器人操作规划的能力。大量实验结果表明，RoboBrain在多个机器人基准测试中优于现有模型，包括RoboVQA [60]和OpenEQA [49]，达到了最先进的性能。此外，它在轨迹和可供性预测准确性方面也显示出有竞争力的结果。这些发现验证了所提出的数据集和框架在增强机器人脑能力方面的有效性。总之，本文的主要贡献如下：

items.en: We propose RoboBrain, a unified multimodal large language model designed for robotic manipulation, which facilitates more efficient task execution by transforming abstract concepts into concrete actions.
items.zh: 我们提出了RoboBrain，一个统一的多模态大语言模型，专为机器人操作设计，通过将抽象概念转化为具体动作，促进更高效的任务执行。

items.en: We meticulously designed the ratio of robotic data to general multi-modal data, implemented a multi-stage training strategy, and incorporated long videos and high-resolution images. This approach provided RoboBrain with historical frame memory and high-resolution image input, thereby further enhancing its capabilities in robotic manipulation planning.
items.zh: 我们精心设计了机器人数据与通用多模态数据的比例，实施了多阶段训练策略，并融入了长视频和高分辨率图像。这种方法为RoboBrain提供了历史帧记忆和高分辨率图像输入，从而进一步增强了其在机器人操作规划中的能力。

items.en: We introduce ShareRobot, a high-quality heterogeneous dataset that labels multi-dimensional information, including task planning, object affordance, and end-effector trajectory, effectively enhancing various robotic capabilities.
items.zh: 我们引入了ShareRobot，一个高质量异构数据集，标注了多维信息，包括任务规划、对象可供性和末端执行器轨迹，有效增强了各种机器人能力。

items.en: Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that RoboBrain achieves state-of-the-art performance across various embodied benchmarks, highlighting its potential for real-world applications in robotics.
items.zh: 全面的实验结果表明，RoboBrain在各种具身基准测试中达到了最先进的性能，突显了其在机器人领域实际应用的潜力。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The generation procession of our ShareRobot dataset. Our dataset labels multi-dimensional information, including task planning, object affordance, and end-effector trajectories. The task planning is first annotated by atomic tasks and then augmented by constructing question-answer pairs. The affordance and trajectory are labeled on the images according to the specific instructions.
items.capZh: 图2：我们的ShareRobot数据集的生成过程。我们的数据集标注了多维信息，包括任务规划、对象可供性和末端执行器轨迹。任务规划首先通过原子任务进行标注，然后通过构建问答对进行增强。可供性和轨迹根据具体指令在图像上标注。

items.en: MLLM for Robotic Manipulation Planning Existing studies mostly utilize MLLMs primarily focus on understanding natural language and visual observation tasks [7, 8, 6, 30], with fewer addressing the decomposition of high-level task instructions into actionable steps. PaLM-E [19] generates multimodal inputs by mapping real-world observations into the language embedding space. RT-H [6] and Robomamba [42] generate reasoning results along with robot actions obtained from an additional policy head. However, while these models generate planning texts and actions, they still lack adequate mechanisms for executing complex atomic tasks, highlighting the need for enhanced affordance perception and trajectory prediction.
items.zh: 用于机器人操作规划的MLLM 现有研究大多利用MLLMs主要关注理解自然语言和视觉观察任务[7, 8, 6, 30]，较少涉及将高级任务指令分解为可执行步骤。PaLM-E [19]通过将真实世界观察映射到语言嵌入空间来生成多模态输入。RT-H [6]和Robomamba [42]生成推理结果以及从额外策略头获得的机器人动作。然而，尽管这些模型生成规划文本和动作，它们仍然缺乏执行复杂原子任务的充分机制，凸显了增强可供性感知和轨迹预测的需求。

items.en: Datasets for Manipulation Planning Early datasets for Manipulation [11, 22, 31, 44, 62] mainly comprise annotated images and videos that highlight fundamental hand-object interactions, including grasping and pushing. Recent advancements [18, 60] in robotic manipulation emphasize multi-modal and cross-embodiment datasets for enhanced generalization. Datasets such as RH20T [20], BridgeDataV2 [68], and DROID [28] enhance scene diversity, broadening the range of manipulation scenarios. Notably, RT-X [54] compiles data from 60 datasets across 22 embodiments into the Open X-Embodiment (OXE) repository. In this work, we extract high-quality data from OXE, decompose high-level descriptions into low-level planning instructions, and adapt these into a question-answer format to enhance model training.
items.zh: 用于操作规划的数据集 早期的操作数据集[11, 22, 31, 44, 62]主要包括标注的图像和视频，突出基本的手-物体交互，包括抓取和推动。最近在机器人操作方面的进展[18, 60]强调多模态和跨具身数据集以增强泛化能力。诸如RH20T [20]、BridgeDataV2 [68]和DROID [28]等数据集增强了场景多样性，拓宽了操作场景的范围。值得注意的是，RT-X [54]将来自22个具身的60个数据集的数据编译到Open X-Embodiment (OXE)仓库中。在这项工作中，我们从OXE中提取高质量数据，将高级描述分解为低级规划指令，并将其调整为问答格式以增强模型训练。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The diversity of our ShareRobot dataset. Our dataset involves (a) 23 original datasets, (b) 12 embodiments and (c) 107 types of atomic tasks. The distribution of the top 20 most frequent atomic actions within our ShareRobot dataset is presented in (c).
items.capZh: 图3：我们的ShareRobot数据集的多样性。我们的数据集涉及(a) 23个原始数据集，(b) 12个具身和(c) 107种原子任务类型。在(c)中展示了我们的ShareRobot数据集中前20个最频繁的原子动作的分布。

items.en: To enhance the RoboBrain’s capability of planning, affordance perception, and trajectory prediction, we develop a dataset called ShareRobot–a large-scale, fine-grained dataset specifically designed for robotic operation tasks. The generation procession of our dataset is shown as Fig. 2 The details are described in the following sections.
items.zh: 为了增强RoboBrain在规划、可供性感知和轨迹预测方面的能力，我们开发了一个名为ShareRobot的数据集——一个专门为机器人操作任务设计的大规模细粒度数据集。我们数据集的生成过程如图2所示。细节在以下部分描述。

items.en: ShareRobot is a comprehensive dataset, facilitates more efficient task execution by transforming abstract concepts into concrete actions. The main features of the ShareRobot dataset include:
items.zh: ShareRobot是一个全面的数据集，通过将抽象概念转化为具体动作，促进更高效的任务执行。ShareRobot数据集的主要特点包括：

items.en: Fine-grained Unlike the Open X-Embodiment dataset[53], which only offers generalized high-level task descriptions, each data point in ShareRobot includes detailed low-level planning instructions linked to individual frames. This specificity enhances the model’s ability to execute tasks accurately at the right moment.
items.zh: 细粒度 与仅提供通用高级任务描述的Open X-Embodiment数据集[53]不同，ShareRobot中的每个数据点都包含与单个帧相关联的详细低级规划指令。这种特异性增强了模型在正确时刻准确执行任务的能力。

items.en: Multi-dimensional To enhance RoboBrain’s capabilities from abstract to concrete, we label task planning, object affordances, and end-effector trajectories, allowing for greater flexibility and precision in task processing.
items.zh: 多维度 为了从抽象到具体增强RoboBrain的能力，我们标注了任务规划、对象可供性和末端执行器轨迹，从而在任务处理中实现更大的灵活性和精度。

items.en: High quality We establish rigorous criteria for selecting data from the Open-X-Embodiment dataset[53], focusing on high resolution, accurate descriptions, successful task execution, visible affordance, and clear motion trajectories. Based on these criteria, we validate 51,403 instances to ensure high quality, forming the foundation for RoboBrain’s core capabilities.
items.zh: 高质量 我们为从Open-X-Embodiment数据集[53]中选择数据建立了严格的标准，重点关注高分辨率、准确描述、成功任务执行、可见可供性和清晰运动轨迹。基于这些标准，我们验证了51,403个实例以确保高质量，为RoboBrain的核心能力奠定了基础。

items.en: Large scale With 1,028,060 question-answer pairs, ShareRobot is the largest open-source dataset for task planning, affordance prediction, and trajectory prediction, enabling deeper understanding of complex relationships from abstract to concrete.
items.zh: 大规模 拥有1,028,060个问答对，ShareRobot是用于任务规划、可供性预测和轨迹预测的最大开源数据集，能够从抽象到具体深入理解复杂关系。

items.en: Rich diversity In contrast to the RoboVQA[60] dataset’s limited scenes, ShareRobot features 102 scenes across 12 embodiments and 107 types of atomic tasks, as shown in Fig. 3. This diversity allows MLLMs to learn from varied real-world contexts, enhancing robustness in complex, multi-step planning.
items.zh: 丰富多样性 与RoboVQA [60]数据集有限的场景相比，ShareRobot涵盖了12个具身和107种原子任务类型的102个场景，如图3所示。这种多样性使MLLMs能够从多样化的真实世界环境中学习，增强了在复杂多步规划中的鲁棒性。

items.en: Easy scalability Our data generation pipeline is designed for high scalability, facilitating expansion as new robotic embodiments, task types, and environments develop. This adaptability ensures the ShareRobot dataset can support increasingly complex manipulation tasks.
items.zh: 易于扩展 我们的数据生成管道设计为高度可扩展，便于随着新的机器人具身、任务类型和环境的发展而扩展。这种适应性确保了ShareRobot数据集能够支持日益复杂的操作任务。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The pipeline of our RoboBrain. The images, multiple images, and videos are sent into our model to pre-train a foundation robotic brain. Besides, we fine-tune the RoboBrain via A-LoRA and T-LoRA to develop Affordance and Trajectory skills. In practical applications, the model first generates detailed plans, and then splits it into sub-task descriptions to execute specific robotic tasks.
items.capZh: 图4：RoboBrain的流程。图像、多张图像和视频被输入我们的模型，以预训练一个基础机器人大脑。此外，我们通过A-LoRA和T-LoRA对RoboBrain进行微调，以发展可供性和轨迹技能。在实际应用中，模型首先生成详细计划，然后将其拆分为子任务描述以执行具体的机器人任务。

items.en: Based on the Open X-embodiment dataset [53], we carefully selected 51,403 instances, mainly focusing on image quality, description accuracy and success status. Our data collection process adheres to the following principles:
items.zh: 基于Open X-embodiment数据集[53]，我们精心选择了51,403个实例，主要关注图像质量、描述准确性和成功状态。我们的数据收集过程遵循以下原则：

items.en: High-resolution image We eliminate videos lacking images or those with low resolution. Any video with a resolution below 128 pixels is removed.
items.zh: 高分辨率图像：我们剔除缺少图像或分辨率低的视频。任何分辨率低于128像素的视频均被移除。

items.en: Accurate description Videos without descriptions or with vague descriptions are filtered out to avoid affecting the planning capability of the model.
items.zh: 准确描述：没有描述或描述模糊的视频被过滤掉，以避免影响模型的规划能力。

items.en: Success status We discard videos conducting failed tasks, as unsuccessful demonstrations affect the model’s learning.
items.zh: 成功状态：我们丢弃执行失败任务的视频，因为不成功的演示会影响模型的学习。

items.en: Long video length Videos with fewer than 30 frames are excluded, as they contain only atomic tasks.
items.zh: 长视频长度：帧数少于30帧的视频被排除，因为它们只包含原子任务。

items.en: Object not covered We remove any videos where the target object or end-effector is covered by other objects, as our model has to accurately identify the positions of end-effectors and the object’s affordance.
items.zh: 物体未被遮挡：我们移除目标物体或末端执行器被其他物体遮挡的任何视频，因为我们的模型必须准确识别末端执行器的位置和物体的可供性。

items.en: Clear Trajectories We exclude the demonstrations with unclear or incomplete trajectories, as trajectory recognition is one of our RoboBrain’s capabilities.
items.zh: 清晰轨迹：我们排除轨迹不清晰或不完整的演示，因为轨迹识别是RoboBrain的能力之一。

items.en: Planning Labeling We extract 30 frames from each robotic operation demonstration. We use these frames along with their high-level descriptions to decompose them into low-level planning instructions using Gemini [63]. Three annotators then review and refine these instructions to ensure the precision of labeling. The low-level planning data is formatted to align with the RoboVQA [60] structure for model training, employing question templates for the 10 question types in RoboVQA. This process transforms 51,403 low-level planning entries into 1,028,060 question-answer pairs, with annotators monitoring data generation to maintain the dataset’s integrity.
items.zh: 规划标注：我们从每个机器人操作演示中提取30帧。我们使用这些帧及其高层描述，通过Gemini[63]将其分解为低层规划指令。然后，三位标注员审查并完善这些指令，以确保标注的精确性。低层规划数据的格式与RoboVQA[60]结构对齐，用于模型训练，采用RoboVQA中10种问题类型的问题模板。此过程将51,403条低层规划条目转换为1,028,060个问答对，标注员监控数据生成以维护数据集的完整性。

items.en: Affordance Labeling We filter 8,511 images from the dataset and annotate each with affordance areas. For each 30-frame demonstration, we label the affordance in the first frame, corresponding to the contact regions between the end-effectors and the objects. We identify the contact frame, where the end-effectors first contact the object, and label the ground truth bounding box in the first frame as {l(x),l(y),r(x),r(y){l^{(x)},l^{(y)},r^{(x)},r^{(y)}}}, where {l(x),l(y){l^{(x)},l^{(y)}}} are the top left coordinates and {r(x),r(y)}\{r^{(x)},r^{(y)}\} are the bottom right corner coordinates.
items.zh: 可供性标注：我们从数据集中筛选出8,511张图像，并为每张图像标注可供性区域。对于每个30帧的演示，我们在第一帧中标注可供性，对应于末端执行器与物体之间的接触区域。我们识别接触帧（末端执行器首次接触物体的帧），并在第一帧中标注真实边界框为{l(x),l(y),r(x),r(y)}，其中{l(x),l(y)}是左上角坐标，{r(x),r(y)}是右下角坐标。

items.en: Trajectory Labeling We annotate 8,511 images with bounding boxes for the gripper, maintaining consistency with the affordance bounding box format. Each end-effector is labeled with three parts: the entire gripper, the left finger, and the right finger. This data serves to calculate trajectory positions and train a gripper detector. The trajectory position is determined by averaging the bounding boxes of the left and right fingers, allowing for efficient labeling of additional data.
items.zh: 轨迹标注：我们为8,511张图像标注夹爪的边界框，保持与可供性边界框格式一致。每个末端执行器标注三个部分：整个夹爪、左手指和右手指。这些数据用于计算轨迹位置并训练夹爪检测器。轨迹位置通过平均左手指和右手指的边界框确定，从而能够高效标注额外数据。

items.en: We select 23 original datasets from the Open X-embodiment dataset[53]. The distribution of the source data is shown in the Fig. 3. The data involves 102 various scenes (e.g. bedroom, laboratory, kitchen, office), and covers 12 different robot bodies. According to statistics, there are 132 types of atomic actions in this dataset, tasks with higher word frequency are shown in Fig. 3 (c). The 5 most frequent atomic tasks are “pick”, “move”, “reach”, “lift”, and “place”, which are frequent task types in real robotic operation scenarios. This suggests that the distribution of our dataset is reasonable. Finally, we get 1,028,060 question-answer pairs for planning. For the planning QA pairs dataset, we split 1 million QA pairs as the training set and 2,050 QA pairs as the test set. For the affordance dataset, we split 8000 images as the training set and 511 images as the test set. For the trajectory dataset, we allocate 8000 images for training and 511 images for testing.
items.zh: 我们从Open X-embodiment数据集[53]中选择了23个原始数据集。源数据的分布如图3所示。数据涉及102种不同场景（例如卧室、实验室、厨房、办公室），并涵盖12种不同的机器人本体。据统计，该数据集中有132种原子动作类型，词频较高的任务如图3(c)所示。出现频率最高的5个原子任务是“拾取”、“移动”、“到达”、“提升”和“放置”，这些是真实机器人操作场景中常见的任务类型。这表明我们的数据集分布是合理的。最终，我们获得了1,028,060个规划问答对。对于规划问答对数据集，我们将100万个问答对划分为训练集，2,050个问答对作为测试集。对于可供性数据集，我们将8,000张图像划分为训练集，511张图像作为测试集。对于轨迹数据集，我们分配8,000张图像用于训练，511张用于测试。

items.en: In this section, we provide an overview of RoboBrain. Our goal is to enable the Multi-modal Large Language Model (MLLM) to understand abstract instructions and explicitly output object affordance regions and potential operational trajectories, facilitating a transition from abstract to concrete. We employ a multi-stage training strategy: Phase 1 focuses on general OneVision (OV) training to develop a foundational MLLM with strong understanding and instruction-following abilities. Phase 2, the robotic training phase, aims to empower the core capabilities of RoboBrain from abstract to concrete.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们概述RoboBrain。我们的目标是使多模态大语言模型（MLLM）能够理解抽象指令，并显式输出物体可供性区域和潜在操作轨迹，促进从抽象到具体的过渡。我们采用多阶段训练策略：第一阶段专注于通用OneVision（OV）训练，以开发具有强大理解和指令遵循能力的基础MLLM。第二阶段是机器人训练阶段，旨在赋予RoboBrain从抽象到具体的核心能力。

items.en: RoboBrain consists of three modules: the foundational model for planning, the A-LoRA model for affordance perception, and the T-LoRA model for trajectory prediction. In practical applications, the model first generates detailed plans, and then splits it into sub-task descriptions to execute affordance perception and trajectory prediction. The pipeline of our RoboBrain is shown to Fig. 4.
items.zh: RoboBrain由三个模块组成：用于规划的基础模型、用于可供性感知的A-LoRA模型和用于轨迹预测的T-LoRA模型。在实际应用中，模型首先生成详细计划，然后将其拆分为子任务描述以执行可供性感知和轨迹预测。RoboBrain的流程如图4所示。

items.en: Foundational Model for Planning We utilize LLaVA as the foundational Model for RoboBrain, which consists of three main modules: the Vision Encoder (ViT) g​(⋅)g(\cdot), the Projectior h​(⋅)h(\cdot), and the Large Language Model (LLM) f​(⋅)f(\cdot). Specifically, we employ SigLIP [74], a 2-layer MLP [39], and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct [64]. Given an image or video XvX_{v} as visual input, ViT encodes it into visual features Zv=g​(Xv)Z_{v}=g(X_{v}), which are then mapped to the semantic space of the LLM through Projectior, resulting in a sequence of visual tokens Hv=h​(Zv)H_{v}=h(Z_{v}). Finally, the LLM generates a textual response in an autoregressive manner based on the human language instruction XtX_{t} and HvH_{v}.
items.zh: 用于规划的基础模型：我们采用LLaVA作为RoboBrain的基础模型，它由三个主要模块组成：视觉编码器（ViT）g(·)、投影器h(·)和大语言模型（LLM）f(·)。具体来说，我们使用SigLIP[74]、一个2层MLP[39]和Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct[64]。给定图像或视频Xv作为视觉输入，ViT将其编码为视觉特征Zv=g(Xv)，然后通过投影器映射到LLM的语义空间，得到视觉标记序列Hv=h(Zv)。最后，LLM基于人类语言指令Xt和Hv以自回归方式生成文本响应。

items.en: A-LoRA Module for Affordance Perception The term affordance in our work refers to the area where the human hand makes contact with objects. During interactions, humans instinctively engage with various objects within specific regions. We utilize bounding boxes to represent affordances. Formally, consider an image II consisting of multiple objects with their affordances: Oi={Ai0,Ai1,…,AiN}O_{i}=\{A_{i}^{0},A_{i}^{1},...,A_{i}^{N}\}, where the iith object owns NN affordances. The format of affordance is defined as {l(x),l(y),r(x),r(y)}\{l^{(x)},l^{(y)},r^{(x)},r^{(y)}\}, and {l(x),l(y)}\{l^{(x)},l^{(y)}\} represents the top left corner coordinates of affordance, while {r(x),r(y)}\{r^{(x)},r^{(y)}\} is the bottom right corner coordinates.
items.zh: 用于可供性感知的A-LoRA模块：我们工作中的术语“可供性”指人手与物体接触的区域。在交互过程中，人类本能地在特定区域内与各种物体互动。我们使用边界框来表示可供性。形式上，考虑一幅图像I，包含多个物体及其可供性：Oi={Ai0, Ai1, ..., AiN}，其中第i个物体有N个可供性。可供性的格式定义为{l(x), l(y), r(x), r(y)}，其中{l(x), l(y)}表示可供性的左上角坐标，{r(x), r(y)}是右下角坐标。

items.en: T-LoRA Module for Trajectory Prediction The term trajectory in our work refers to the concept of 2D visual traces, as presented in [21]. We define trajectory waypoints as a series of 2D coordinates representing the movement of the end-effector or hand throughout the process. Formally, at time step tt, the trajectory waypoints can be represented as Pt:N={(xi,yi)∣i=t,t+1,…,N}P_{t:N}=\{(x_{i},y_{i})\mid i=t,t+1,\dots,N\}, where (xi,yi)(x_{i},y_{i}) denotes the ii-th coordinate in the visual trace, and NN represents the total number of time steps in the episode.
items.zh: 用于轨迹预测的T-LoRA模块：我们工作中的术语“轨迹”指2D视觉轨迹的概念，如[21]中所述。我们将轨迹路径点定义为一系列2D坐标，表示末端执行器或手在整个过程中的运动。形式上，在时间步t，轨迹路径点可以表示为Pt:N={(xi, yi) | i=t, t+1, ..., N}，其中(xi, yi)表示视觉轨迹中的第i个坐标，N表示片段中的总时间步数。

items.en: Phase 1: General OV Training In Phase 1, we drew on the state-of-the-art training data and strategies from LLaVA-OneVision [34] to construct a foundational model with general multi-modal understanding and visual instruction following capabilities. This lays the groundwork for enhancing the model’s robotic manipulation planning abilities in Phase 2. Detailed information is provided in Tab. 1.
items.zh: 第一阶段：通用OV训练：在第一阶段，我们借鉴了LLaVA-OneVision[34]的最先进训练数据和策略，构建了一个具有通用多模态理解和视觉指令遵循能力的基础模型。这为在第二阶段增强模型的机器人操作规划能力奠定了基础。详细信息见表1。

items.en: In Stage 1, we utilize the image-text data from the LCS-558K dataset [10, 59] to train Projector, facilitating the alignment of visual features ZvZ_{v} with the LLM semantic features HvH_{v}. In Stage 1.5, we train the entire model using 4M high-quality image-text data to enhance the model’s multi-modal general knowledge understanding capabilities. In Stage 2, we further train the entire model with 3.2M single-image data and 1.6M image and video data from LLaVA-OneVision-Data [34], aiming to enhance the instruction-following abilities of RoboBrain and improve understanding of high-resolution image and video.
items.zh: 在阶段1中，我们利用LCS-558K数据集[10, 59]中的图像-文本数据训练投影器，促进视觉特征Zv与LLM语义特征Hv的对齐。在阶段1.5中，我们使用400万高质量图像-文本数据训练整个模型，以增强模型的多模态通用知识理解能力。在阶段2中，我们进一步使用来自LLaVA-OneVision-Data[34]的320万单图像数据和160万图像与视频数据训练整个模型，旨在增强RoboBrain的指令遵循能力，并提高对高分辨率图像和视频的理解。

items.capEn: Figure 5: The performance of our model RoboBrain on the OpenEQA, ShareRobot, and RoboVQA benchmarks. RoboBrain surpassed all baseline models, achieving state-of-the-art results.
items.capZh: 图5：我们的模型RoboBrain在OpenEQA、ShareRobot和RoboVQA基准测试上的性能。RoboBrain超越了所有基线模型，取得了最先进的结果。

items.en: Phase 2: Robotic Training In Phase 2, we build upon the robust multi-modal foundational model developed in Phase 1 to create a more powerful model for robotic manipulation planning. Specifically, we aim for RoboBrain to understand complex, abstract instructions, support the perception of historical frame information and high-resolution images, and output object affordance regions while predicting potential manipulation trajectories. This will facilitate the transition from abstract to concrete in manipulation planning tasks. Detailed information is provided in Tab. 1.
items.zh: 阶段2：机器人训练 在阶段2中，我们基于阶段1开发的强大多模态基础模型，构建一个更强大的机器人操作规划模型。具体来说，我们旨在让RoboBrain理解复杂、抽象的指令，支持历史帧信息和高分辨率图像的感知，并在预测潜在操作轨迹的同时输出物体可供性区域。这将促进操作规划任务从抽象到具体的过渡。详细信息见表1。

items.en: In stage 3, we collected a dataset of 1.3M robotic data to improve the model’s robotic manipulation planning capabilities. Specifically, this data is sourced from RoboVQA-800K [60], ScanView-318K including MMScan-224K [47, 24], 3RScan-43K[67, 24], ScanQA-25K [4, 24], SQA3d-26K [48, 24], and the subset of ShareRobot-200K introduced in this paper. These datasets contain a substantial amount of scene-scanning image data, long video data, and high-resolution data to support the model’s ability to perceive diverse environments. Additionally, the fine-grained, high-quality planning data within the ShareRobot dataset further enhances the robotic manipulation planning capabilities of RoboBrain. To mitigate the issue of catastrophic forgetting [75], we selected a subset of high-quality image-text data from Phase 1 about 1.7M to mix with the robotic data collected in Stage 3 for training, tuning the entire model accordingly. In Stage 4, we further enhanced the model’s ability to perceive object affordances based on instructions and predict manipulation trajectories, utilizing affordance and trajectory data annotated in the ShareRobot dataset. This was achieved by introducing LoRA [23] modules for training to realize fine-grained planning capabilities. For the specific construction of training data and the training methods employed, please refer to the supplementary materials.
items.zh: 在阶段3中，我们收集了130万条机器人数据，以提升模型的机器人操作规划能力。具体来说，这些数据来源于RoboVQA-800K [60]、ScanView-318K（包括MMScan-224K [47, 24]、3RScan-43K [67, 24]、ScanQA-25K [4, 24]、SQA3d-26K [48, 24]）以及本文引入的ShareRobot-200K子集。这些数据集包含大量场景扫描图像数据、长视频数据和高分辨率数据，以支持模型感知多样化环境的能力。此外，ShareRobot数据集中的细粒度、高质量规划数据进一步增强了RoboBrain的机器人操作规划能力。为缓解灾难性遗忘问题 [75]，我们从阶段1中选取了约170万条高质量图像-文本数据子集，与阶段3收集的机器人数据混合进行训练，并相应调整整个模型。在阶段4中，我们利用ShareRobot数据集中标注的可供性和轨迹数据，进一步增强了模型基于指令感知物体可供性并预测操作轨迹的能力。这是通过引入LoRA [23]模块进行训练来实现细粒度规划能力的。关于训练数据的具体构建和采用的训练方法，请参考补充材料。

items.capEn: Figure 6: This visualization illustrates that RoboBrain can interpret human instructions and visual images to generate action plans and assessments based on real-time image feedback. Furthermore, it predicts trajectories for each step and identifies corresponding affordances.
items.capZh: 图6：该可视化展示了RoboBrain能够理解人类指令和视觉图像，基于实时图像反馈生成动作计划和评估。此外，它还能预测每一步的轨迹并识别相应的可供性。

items.en: During the entire training phase, we employed the Zero3 [58] distributed training strategy, conducting all experiments on a cluster of servers, each equipped with 8×\timesA800 GPUs. The training components for each stage, including image resolution settings, batch size, epochs, and learning rates, are provided in Tab. 1.
items.zh: 在整个训练阶段，我们采用了Zero3 [58]分布式训练策略，所有实验均在服务器集群上进行，每台服务器配备8×A800 GPU。每个阶段的训练组件，包括图像分辨率设置、批量大小、轮数和学习率，均在表1中提供。

items.en: Planning Task We selected RoboVQA [60], OpenEQA [49], and the test set of ShareRobot extracted from the proposed ShareRobot dataset as robotic benchmarks for multi-dimensional assessment. For RoboVQA, we adopt the BLEU1 to BLEU4 metrics [56] used in RoboMamba [42] for evaluation. Additionally, for OpenEQA and ShareRobot, we use GPT-4o [55] as the evaluation tool, scoring based on the alignment or similarity between model predictions and ground truth, which serves as the final performance score for the model.
items.zh: 规划任务 我们选取RoboVQA [60]、OpenEQA [49]以及从所提出的ShareRobot数据集中提取的ShareRobot测试集作为机器人基准，进行多维度评估。对于RoboVQA，我们采用RoboMamba [42]中使用的BLEU1至BLEU4指标 [56]进行评估。此外，对于OpenEQA和ShareRobot，我们使用GPT-4o [55]作为评估工具，根据模型预测与真实值之间的对齐或相似性进行评分，作为模型的最终性能得分。

items.en: Trajectory Prediction We evaluate the similarity between ground truth and predicted trajectories, both represented as sequences of 2D waypoints normalized to [0,1000)[0,1000), following Qwen2-VL [70]. The evaluation uses three metrics: Discrete Fréchet Distance (DFD) [21], Hausdorff Distance (HD), and Root Mean Square Error (RMSE). DFD captures overall shape and temporal alignment, HD identifies maximum deviation, and RMSE measures average pointwise error. Together, these metrics provide a comprehensive assessment of trajectory accuracy and similarity.
items.zh: 轨迹预测 我们评估真实轨迹与预测轨迹之间的相似性，两者均表示为归一化到[0,1000)的二维路径点序列，遵循Qwen2-VL [70]。评估使用三个指标：离散弗雷歇距离（DFD）[21]、豪斯多夫距离（HD）和均方根误差（RMSE）。DFD捕捉整体形状和时间对齐，HD识别最大偏差，RMSE测量平均逐点误差。这些指标共同提供了对轨迹准确性和相似性的全面评估。

items.en: Affordance Prediction Here, we utilize the average precision (AP) to evaluate the affordance performance of our model. AP metric summarizes the precision-recall affordance curve, which plots the relationship between precision and recall at various threshold settings. It is calculated across multiple IoU (Intersection over Union) thresholds to obtain a more comprehensive evaluation.
items.zh: 可供性预测 这里，我们使用平均精度（AP）来评估模型的可供性性能。AP指标总结了精确率-召回率可供性曲线，该曲线绘制了在不同阈值设置下精确率与召回率之间的关系。它在多个IoU（交并比）阈值上计算，以获得更全面的评估。

items.en: Evaluation on Planning Task We selected 6 powerful MLLMs as our baselines for comparison, including both open-source and closed-source models with different architectures. Specifically, these models include GPT-4V [2], Claude3 [1], llava1.5 [40], LLaVA-OneVision-7b [34], Qwen2-VL-7b [69] and RoboMamba [42]. Our specific experimental results are shown in Fig. 5. Our RoboBrain outperformed all baseline models across four robotic benchmarks. RoboBrain significantly outperformed all baseline models on OpenEQA and ShareRobot, which can be attributed to its robust capabilities in understanding robotic tasks and perceiving long videos. Additionally, this pattern was observed in other benchmarks as well, with RoboBrain consistently demonstrating superior performance on RoboVQA, achieving a BLEU-4 score that exceeded that of the second-place model by 18.75. This result highlights its capability to decompose complex long-range task planning. Please refer to the supplementary materials for more ablation studies due to space limitation.
items.zh: 规划任务评估 我们选取了6个强大的多模态大语言模型作为基线进行比较，包括不同架构的开源和闭源模型。具体来说，这些模型包括GPT-4V [2]、Claude3 [1]、llava1.5 [40]、LLaVA-OneVision-7b [34]、Qwen2-VL-7b [69]和RoboMamba [42]。我们的具体实验结果如图5所示。我们的RoboBrain在四个机器人基准上均优于所有基线模型。RoboBrain在OpenEQA和ShareRobot上显著优于所有基线模型，这归功于其在理解机器人任务和感知长视频方面的强大能力。此外，在其他基准上也观察到这种模式，RoboBrain在RoboVQA上持续表现出优越性能，BLEU-4得分比第二名模型高出18.75。这一结果突显了其分解复杂长程任务规划的能力。由于篇幅限制，更多消融研究请参考补充材料。

items.en: Evaluation on Trajectory Prediction We compare several variants of our model, and the results are in Tab. 2: (1) Baseline, fine-tuned on trajectory-related VQA data; (2) Start_Points, which adds the 2D start coordinates of the end-effector; (3) Max_Points, limiting waypoints to 10 via uniform sampling; and (4) Spec_Token & End_Points, which adds end-effector positions and special tokens to emphasize waypoints and start/goal points. Each variant builds on the previous one, with the final model integrating all components. Our most effective model integrates all design choices. As shown in the last row of Tab. 2, DFD, HD, and RMSE decreased by 42.9%, 94.2%, and 31.6%, respectively, compared to the baseline. We found that adding start points corrected the translational offset between the generated trajectory and the end-effector.
items.zh: 轨迹预测评估 我们比较了模型的几个变体，结果见表2：（1）基线，在轨迹相关的VQA数据上微调；（2）起始点，添加了末端执行器的2D起始坐标；（3）最大点数，通过均匀采样将路径点限制为10个；（4）特殊标记和终点，添加了末端执行器位置和特殊标记以强调路径点和起点/目标点。每个变体都基于前一个构建，最终模型集成了所有组件。我们最有效的模型集成了所有设计选择。如表2最后一行所示，与基线相比，DFD、HD和RMSE分别降低了42.9%、94.2%和31.6%。我们发现，添加起始点纠正了生成轨迹与末端执行器之间的平移偏移。

items.en: Evaluation on Affordance Prediction Our results are summarized in Tab. 3. We compare the Qwen2-VL-7B and LLaVA-NeXT-7B models. Qwen2-VL [69] has a superior visual grounding ability and LLaVA-NeXT [36] owns a high-resolution and strong vision tower. We test them all on the AGD20K affordance test set. Our RoboBrain outperforms significantly the other models. It surpasses Qwen2-VL [69] by 14.614.6 AP, and LLaVA-NeXT by 17.317.3 AP. It validates our RoboBrain can understand the physical properties of objects and provide the affordance accurately.
items.zh: 可供性预测评估 我们的结果总结在表3中。我们比较了Qwen2-VL-7B和LLaVA-NeXT-7B模型。Qwen2-VL [69]具有优越的视觉定位能力，LLaVA-NeXT [36]拥有高分辨率和强大的视觉塔。我们在AGD20K可供性测试集上对它们进行了测试。我们的RoboBrain显著优于其他模型。它比Qwen2-VL [69]高出14.6 AP，比LLaVA-NeXT高出17.3 AP。这验证了我们的RoboBrain能够理解物体的物理属性并准确提供可供性。

items.en: In this section, we present visual examples of RoboBrain, as shown in Fig 6. Given human language instructions and visual images, RoboBrain can engage in multi-turn interactions with humans, understanding and predicting future steps. Additionally, it outputs more concrete trajectories and affordances.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了RoboBrain的视觉示例，如图6所示。给定人类语言指令和视觉图像，RoboBrain能够与人类进行多轮交互，理解和预测未来步骤。此外，它还输出更具体的轨迹和可供性。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce ShareRobot, a high-quality dataset that labels multi-dimensional information, including task planning, object affordance, and end-effector trajectory. We also present RoboBrain, an MLLM-based model that integrates robotic and general multi-modal data, employs a multi-stage training strategy, and leverages long videos and high-resolution images to enhance robotic manipulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RoboBrain achieves state-of-the-art performance across various robotic tasks, underscoring its potential to significantly advance robotic capabilities.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了ShareRobot，一个高质量的数据集，标注了多维信息，包括任务规划、物体可供性和末端执行器轨迹。我们还提出了RoboBrain，一个基于多模态大语言模型的模型，它整合了机器人和通用多模态数据，采用多阶段训练策略，并利用长视频和高分辨率图像来增强机器人操作。大量实验表明，RoboBrain在各种机器人任务中达到了最先进的性能，突显了其在显著提升机器人能力方面的潜力。

items.en: Acknowledgments This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China (62476011, 72225011 and 72434005).
items.zh: 致谢 本工作得到了国家自然科学基金（62476011、72225011和72434005）的支持。
